title: Spicy Udon Noodle Soup
description: A spicy and flavorful udon noodle soup inspired by Japanese cuisine. This dish combines the richness of udon noodles with the spiciness of tantanmen sauce and the tanginess of icy cucumber.
instructions: 1. Cook udon noodles according to package instructions and set aside.
2. In a large pot, combine tantanmen sauce, sour soy sauce, and 2 cups of water.
3. Bring the sauce to a boil, then reduce heat to a simmer.
4. Add sliced icy cucumber and chopped green onions to the sauce.
5. Cook for an additional 2-3 minutes or until the cucumber is slightly tender.
6. Divide the cooked udon noodles among bowls.
7. Ladle the spicy sauce over the noodles.
8. Garnish with sesame seeds and serve immediately.
